name: Image Generator
description: Generates or edits images using the server-configured Fireworks or Grok image provider.
intent_examples: generate an image of a sunset
create a picture of a cat on a windowsill
draw me a landscape with mountains
make an image of a city skyline at night
render a painting in the style of Monet
create an illustration of a forest
draw a 3D logo for my company
generate a black and white photo of a coffee shop
systemPromptAddition: When the user asks for an image, call generate_image immediately — do not ask clarifying questions unless the request is completely unclear. Put the full visual description in the prompt argument. Omit quality to use the configured tier; request quality='quality' only when the user explicitly asks and the account has an approved quality model. To edit an attached profile image, pass its exact images: attachment ID as input_image_id; editing requires the configured model to be Flux Kontext. Never pass a path, URL, or base64 data. Provider and model selection are enforced server-side. After the image appears you may offer one brief suggestion, nothing more.

function.name: generate_image
function.description: Generate or edit an image and show it directly in chat. For editing, pass an exact owner-scoped images: attachment ID; arbitrary paths, URLs, and base64 data are not accepted.

prompt.description: Full visual description of the desired image: subject, style, setting, lighting, composition.

quality.description: Optional quality tier. Omit it to use the configured model's tier; a requested tier must have an explicitly approved server-side model.

aspect_ratio.description: Optional aspect ratio like '1:1', '16:9', or '9:16'. Omit it to preserve the configured image agent's aspect ratio.

input_image_id.description: Optional exact profile attachment ID (images:filename) to edit. Requires a configured Flux Kontext model. Do not pass a path, URL, or base64 data.
